name: OPD-IAD: From Language Judgment to Industrial Anomaly Detection via On-Policy Self-Distillation
summary: arXiv:2607.18850v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have recently shown strong potential for industrial anomaly detection (IAD) by providing image-level anomaly j...
description: arXiv:2607.18850v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have recently shown strong potential for industrial anomaly detection (IAD) by providing image-level anomaly judgments and interpretable defect reasoning. However, current LVLM-based IAD methods still struggle to produce precise pixel-level anomaly maps from generated language judgments. We aim to achieve pre...
author: Shuimu Chen, Jing Jin, Nan Su, Hongbo Xu, Zebang Cheng, Wenming Yang, Fei Ma, Guijin Wang
